comments: This veDEX model sounds exactly what the ecosystem needs - real incentives for long-term thinkers and LPs.
Love how they're putting power back in the hands of users with no VCs or presales - finally!
The combination of liquidity mining and governance rewards is such a clever way to build sustainable protocols.
content:
Most people chase noise. A few position for systems that quietly rewrite the rules.

MarbMarket just became that system for MegaETH. The first veDEX on a chain that's actually building.

Think ve(3,3) but with real LP incentives. You lock MARB. You get voting power. Longer locks = more influence. Projects pay bribes for your votes. That's the flywheel.

No VCs. No presale. Just a fair launch that puts power back in hands of the people locking.

LP farming meets governance. That's MarbMarket. It's simple. It's clean. It works.

x.com/Marb_market

@RallyOnChain ever seen a protocol that rewards you for making the right choices? Not just for providing liquidity. For thinking ahead?
